zh.Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾拉文斯沃斯
zh.Ghent, Arrondissement Gent, East Flander: 比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Henry Scrope於1312年9月29日出生在英國越可爾馬斯哈姆時，他的父親Sir Geoffrey le Scrope32歲，母親Ivetta De Ros Scrope27歲。他於大約1336年與Joan在英國越可爾馬斯哈姆結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1392年7月31日在英國越可爾享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Henry Scrope于1312年9月29日出生在英国越可爾馬斯哈姆时，他的父亲Sir Geoffrey le Scrope32岁，母亲Ivetta De Ros Scrope27岁。他于大约1336年与Joan在英国越可爾馬斯哈姆结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1392年7月31日在英国越可爾享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: Scrope
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman: of uncertain origin. Tengvik suggests derivation from the Old Scandinavian personal name Skrópi (of doubtful etymology, but compare Old Scandinavian skrópa-maðr ‘hypocrite’, containing the genitive plural form of skrópar ‘sham, hypocrisy’). It is possible, but not certain, that this personal name forms the first element of the Notts place-name Scrooby. Otherwise there is no evidence for its currency in England or, more relevantly, in Normandy. Richards Castle (in Herefs and Shrops) was apparently named after Richard Scrope, who held estates in Herefs and Worcs in 1066 and was a Norman favourite of Edward the Confessor. The Scrope family, whose name is traditionally pronounced /skru:p/, was politically important in medieval England, and acquired estates in Lincs (Barton on Humber), NR Yorks (Castle Bolton), and in ER Yorks (Flotmanby). Richard (le) Scrope of Bolton, in Wensleydale, was Lord Chancellor in the reign of Richard II. The use of le and de in the surname, suggesting either a nickname or a locative name, must be treated with caution because these were often added gratuitously to Anglo-Norman surnames as a sign of high social status.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Henry Scrope was born on 29 September 1312, in Masham, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir Geoffrey le Scrope, was 32 and his mother, Ivetta De Ros Scrope, was 27. He married Joan about 1336, in Masham, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 31 July 1392, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Henry Scrope est né le 29 septembre 1312, à Masham, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Geoffrey le Scrope, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Ivetta De Ros Scrope, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Joan environ 1336, à Masham, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 31 juillet 1392, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Henry Scrope am 29. September 1312 in Masham, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Geoffrey le Scrope 32 und seine Mutter Ivetta De Ros Scrope 27. Er hat um 1336 in Masham, Yorkshire, England Joan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 31. Juli 1392 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry Scrope è nato il il 29 settembre 1312 nel Masham, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Geoffrey le Scrope, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Ivetta De Ros Scrope, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Joan circa 1336, nel Masham, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 31 luglio 1392, nel Yorkshire, England, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Henry Scropeが1312年9月29日にイギリスヨークシュアイアマシャムで生まれた時，父Sir Geoffrey le Scropeは32歳，母Ivetta De Ros Scropeは27歳であった。約1336年にイギリスヨークシュアイアマシャムでJoanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1392年7月31日にイギリスヨークシュアイアで79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Henry Scrope(이)가 1312년 9월 29일 영국 요르크실르 마샤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Geoffrey le Scrope(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Ivetta De Ros Scrope(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1336년 영국 요르크실르 마샤에서 Joan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1392년 7월 31일 영국 요르크실르에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.29 September 1312–31 July 1392: 29 de setembro de 1312–31 de julho de 1392
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry Scrope nasceu em 29 de setembro de 1312, em Masham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Geoffrey le Scrope, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Ivetta De Ros Scrope, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan aproximadamente 1336, em Masham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 31 de julho de 1392, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Henry Scrope родился 29 сентября 1312 г. в местности машам, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Geoffrey le Scrope было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Ivetta De Ros Scrope, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan около 1336 г. в местности машам, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 31 июля 1392 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 79 лет.

es.29 September 1312–31 July 1392: 29 de septiembre de 1312–31 de julio de 1392
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Henry Scrope nació el 29 de septiembre de 1312, en Masham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Geoffrey le Scrope, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Ivetta De Ros Scrope, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Joan aproximadamente 1336, en Masham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 31 de julio de 1392, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 79 años.
